name: Cloak of Nightmares
description: Notes Just as with the T6 Cloak of Ghostly Concealment, chain cloaking using the Cloak of Nightmares requires the player to have a pet with an MP Heal level of at least 64 (6.72 MP/s), assuming the WIS stat is maxed and you are not In Combat.
effects: After exiting sneak: Fire 2 additional projectiles dealing damage equal to your Lethal Strike damage for 2.4 seconds. Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 80 (+3 per WIS > 34) and 55% (+0.5% per WIS > 34) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds MP Cost: 2 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.1 sec
